title: Karur home-textile exports reclaim pre-2024 peak after India-EU deal
summary: Karur's home-textile exporters reported total April shipments matching pre-2024 peak levels, with the India-EU trade deal opening up renewed German and French retail demand for Made-in-Karur towels and bedlinen.

title: Karur counting centre arrangements reviewed; six halls finalised
summary: Karur district authorities have finalised six counting halls across the four Assembly constituencies — Karur, Aravakurichi, Kulithalai and Krishnarayapuram — with full CCTV streaming planned.

title: Cauvery delta paddy procurement begins at Karur DPCs
summary: Direct procurement of Cauvery delta paddy has begun at Karur DPCs at the revised state MSP, with civil supplies officials confirming smooth pickup logistics for the first 1,200 farmers registered.

title: Karur bus body builders adopt EV chassis-conversion line
summary: Karur's bus-body building cluster has commissioned a dedicated EV chassis adaptation line, targeting the state and inter-state intercity electric coach segment as the country shifts to clean-fuel mandates.

title: Karur emerges as top-3 Tamil Nadu UPI transaction-volume district
summary: Karur has emerged as one of the top three districts in Tamil Nadu by UPI transaction volume in the latest NPCI quarterly report, attributed to its dense merchant network and headquartered banks.

title: Heavy rain spell expected for Karur on May 3 and 4
summary: IMD has placed Karur under a yellow rain warning for May 3 and 4, with thunderstorm activity likely across the Aravakurichi and Kulithalai blocks during late afternoon hours.

title: Pasupathipalayam Cauvery footbridge work resumes after monsoon delay
summary: PWD construction crews have resumed work on the long-pending Pasupathipalayam Cauvery footbridge connecting Karur to Erode, with completion now targeted for August 2026.

title: Karur weavers' welfare board distributes pension arrears to 4,800 beneficiaries
summary: The Tamil Nadu Handloom Weavers' Welfare Board distributed pension arrears worth Rs 6.4 crore to 4,800 retired weavers across Karur this week, clearing all backlogs from the previous fiscal year.

title: Karur airport feasibility study commissioned by state planning board
summary: The Tamil Nadu state planning board has commissioned a fresh feasibility study for a regional airport in Karur, citing rising home-textile export volumes and central Tamil Nadu air-connectivity gaps.

title: Karur Vysya Bank reports strong Q4 quarterly numbers
summary: Karur Vysya Bank, one of central Tamil Nadu's oldest financial institutions, reported a robust Q4 with double-digit profit growth and improved asset quality, with the board recommending a final dividend.

title: Kulithalai Amaravathi pumping station gets capacity upgrade
summary: The Amaravathi pumping station at Kulithalai has received a Rs 84 crore capacity upgrade, boosting irrigation supply to nearly 12,000 acres of paddy land in Karur and Tiruchirappalli districts.

title: Karur Mariamman temple festival completes peaceful 11-day run
summary: The annual Karur Mariamman temple festival concluded its peaceful 11-day run with record participation, civic authorities crediting tight crowd management and dedicated traffic-diversion plans.
